title: Dreamy Lazy Croatian Pork Casserole
description: A malty and pillowy Croatian dish featuring orange juice, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this casserole is nut-free-friendly and sure to satisfy, it is a hearty and comforting meal that combines the richness of pork with the brightness of orange juice
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the pork shoulder into 1-inch cubes and season with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat and brown the pork cubes until they are browned on all sides.
Add the sliced onion to the pot and cook until it is softened and translucent.
Add the sliced carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the orange juice and malt syrup to the pot and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake the casserole for 2 1/2 hours, or until the pork is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
